channel.title: Prem Watsa — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED OXY (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added OXY in Q4 2025 · 15.5% of portfolio. Aligning with Buffett on Occidental.

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED OXY (+20%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added OXY in Q3 2025 · 13.5% of portfolio. Aligning with Buffett on Occidental.

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED MU (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added MU in Q3 2025 · 7.4% of portfolio. Semi cycle bet.

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED PFE (+37%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added PFE (PFIZER INC) in Q3 2025 · 1.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED KHC (+45%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added KHC (KRAFT HEINZ CO) in Q2 2025 · 6.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Prem Watsa: TRIMMED TSM (-34%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) trimmed TSM (TAIWAN SEMICONDUCTOR MFG LTD) in Q2 2025 · 1.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Prem Watsa: EXITED MU (-100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) exited MU (MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Prem Watsa: EXITED MKTX (-100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) exited MKTX (MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
